title: Why does XanaNode exist?
summary: XanaNode exists to preserve relationships, provenance, disagreement, lineage, and reusable fragments as durable knowledge structure.
content:
A normal website can publish text. XanaNode publishes the relationships behind the text. It is meant for authored knowledge substrates where sources, claims, trails, versions, transclusions, conflicts, and projection layers remain inspectable instead of disappearing into a flat page.

More directly, XanaNode exists to answer a three-part computing failure: document boundaries collapse knowledge structure, copy-and-paste reuse breaks provenance and lineage, and local-first tools without a common substrate protocol still leave knowledge trapped inside separate applications.
